Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student in the Krav Magá IPIRANGA school.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

phone.description: The phone number of the student.

readyForReview.description: Indicates if the student is ready for a belt review.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Represents a payment plan for students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plan entity.

name.description: The name of the plan (e.g., monthly, quarterly).

durationMonths.description: The duration of the plan in months.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a payment made by a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

studentName.description: Denormalized student name for easy display.

paymentDate.description: The date the payment was made.

planType.description: The type of plan or payment (e.g., Mensal, Matrícula).

expirationDate.description: The date the plan paid for by this payment expires.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Exam entity.

result.description: The result of the exam (e.g., pass, fail).

MonthlyIndicator.title: MonthlyIndicator
MonthlyIndicator.description: Represents the key performance indicators for a specific month.

id.description: Unique identifier for the monthly report, usually in 'YYYY-MM' format.

previousMonthTotal.description: Total number of students at the end of the previous month.

visits.description: Number of visits during the month.

definition.description: Stores student data. Includes denormalized 'planId' for authorization independence. This enables us to define rules that only allow the user with {studentId} to access this data and/or admin users.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the student.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment plan.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

definition.description: Stores exam information for each student.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the student.

params.name: examId
params.description: The unique identifier for the exam.

definition.description: Documents in this collection indicate admin privileges. Existence of a document grants admin access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores monthly performance indicators. The document ID should be in 'YYYY-MM' format.

params.name: indicatorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the monthly indicator report.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Krav Magá IPIRANGA Manager application, focusing on simplicity, security, and scalability. The structure emphasizes Authorization Independence to avoid complex security rules and ensure atomic operations. Path-based ownership is used where applicable for simplicity and security. 

**Authorization Independence:** Authorization independence is achieved by avoiding `get()` calls in security rules. Data required for authorization (such as user roles or group membership) is denormalized into the documents where it's needed. In the case of students that are associated with a payment plan, if authorization depends on plan attributes those attributes are copied into the student documents.

**QAPs Support:**
*   **Secure List Operations:** The segregation of data into collections with homogeneous security postures ensures that `list` operations can be secured effectively without complex filtering logic in rules.
*   **Ownership and Collaboration:** Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/...`) simplifies security rules for private user data. Using membership maps, collaboration is supported. For example, an admin role could be checked by verifying the user's ID's existence in the `/roles_admin/{userId}` collection, enabling straightforward, secure access control without needing complex data lookups.

**Structure Overview:**
*   `/students/{studentId}`: Stores student information. This collection utilizes path-based ownership and denormalizes the `planId` to avoid document reads for authorization.
